description: Ensure all pages work properly on mobile devices - test at 375px, 768px, and 1024px breakpoints
acceptance_criteria: All pages render correctly on mobile without horizontal scroll

description: Resolve any TypeScript strict mode errors in StudentWatch component
acceptance_criteria: npm run type-check passes with no errors

task: Add loading states to all pages
description: Add spinner/skeleton loaders while data is fetching
acceptance_criteria: Visual loading indicators appear during data fetch

task: Improve error handling with toast notifications
description: Replace alert() with toast notifications for better UX
acceptance_criteria: All errors show as toast notifications, not alert() dialogs

description: Add ARIA labels, proper semantic HTML, keyboard navigation
acceptance_criteria: Pages pass basic a11y audit (WCAG AA)

description: Ensure signup and login endpoints work correctly with proper validation
acceptance_criteria: Login and signup endpoints return proper JWT tokens

description: Replace in-memory storage with actual Supabase database calls
acceptance_criteria: All data persists in Supabase after server restart

task: Implement real face detection in engagement endpoint
description: Ensure face detection actually analyzes frames instead of returning mock data
acceptance_criteria: Face detection returns accurate results for real video frames

description: Ensure WebSocket properly receives frames and returns attention scores
acceptance_criteria: Real-time attention scores update every 5 seconds over WebSocket

task: Add input validation to all endpoints
description: Validate email, password, session_key, and frame data
acceptance_criteria: All invalid inputs rejected with 400 Bad Request

description: Configure CORS properly and add security headers
acceptance_criteria: CORS allows frontend origin, security headers present

task: Run full test suite and report results
description: Execute npm test and pytest, report all test results
acceptance_criteria: All tests passing or failures clearly documented

description: Run npm run build and verify no errors
acceptance_criteria: npm run build completes without errors

description: Manually test: signup -> login -> dashboard access
acceptance_criteria: Complete login flow works without errors

task: Test video watching with engagement tracking
description: Test student can watch video and see real-time attention scores
acceptance_criteria: Attention scores display and update in real-time

description: Verify all pages work on 375px, 768px, and 1024px widths
acceptance_criteria: No horizontal scroll, all elements visible on mobile

description: Check for XSS, SQL injection, CSRF, authentication issues
acceptance_criteria: Document all findings and recommend fixes

description: Review WebSocket code for memory leaks, proper cleanup, error handling
acceptance_criteria: Document findings and recommend improvements

description: Implement dark/light mode theme switching
acceptance_criteria: Theme toggles between light and dark modes

description: Compress images, lazy-load images, optimize bundle size
acceptance_criteria: Bundle size < 500KB (gzipped) — achieved: 66KB gzip

description: Add proper logging for debugging and monitoring
acceptance_criteria: All endpoints log requests and responses

description: Implement rate limiting on auth endpoints
acceptance_criteria: Login attempts limited to 5 per minute per IP

description: Verify all form validation works correctly
acceptance_criteria: Invalid inputs prevented with clear error messages

description: Document all API endpoints with examples
acceptance_criteria: Swagger docs available at /docs

description: Add service worker and manifest for offline support
acceptance_criteria: App installable and works offline
